Core Capabilities
#  Code, Compile, and Deploy with Triple Alpha
Triple Alpha gives developers the freedom to work at their preferred level of abstraction—whether that’s crafting custom quantum algorithms, exploring physics with processor-specific code, or shaping pulses for error reduction.
![""](https://images.prismic.io/horizon-v2/aYtNkd0YXLCxVqAl_hero-core-capabilities.jpg?auto=format&q=100)
##  Portable, performant code with clear resource insights
At Triple Alpha’s core is a compiler that accelerates classical programs by automatically detecting opportunities for quantum speedup, enabling interoperable code for both classical and quantum systems. By providing portability across hardware manufacturers, Triple Alpha ensures that quantum applications remain useful—no matter which modality emerges as a frontrunner.
Triple Alpha also performs detailed resource counts across every level of abstraction, measuring gate counts, qubit use, and other key metrics. These insights help users fine-tune their programs and choose the most suitable hardware for a program’s resource requirements before execution.
#### Code
Write quantum programs at the level of abstraction that suits your needs and experience. Triple Alpha’s purpose-built languages—[Beryllium, Helium, and Hydrogen](https://www.horizonquantum.com/product/programming-languages)—make it easy to move between high-level algorithm design and fine-grained hardware control, unifying classical and quantum development in a single environment.
#### Compile
Transform hardware-agnostic programs into processor-optimized code. Triple Alpha’s compiler automatically adapts to the connectivity, and it translates the instruction set of target devices, ensuring your programs run efficiently across today’s diverse hardware landscape—without changing a line of source code.
#### Deploy
Compile and deploy your quantum programs in a single step. Incorporate quantum functionality into existing tools, workflows, and applications. Triple Alpha lets you publish APIs directly from any compiler level, allowing for easy integration with other systems—from Python scripts to webpages to Excel macros. Monitor execution, track progress, and retrieve results—all within Triple Alpha.

##  Key functionalities
[![""](https://images.prismic.io/horizon-v2/aYJpt90YXLCxVVNd_card-illustration-turing-complete.png?auto=format,compress) Turing-complete languages Develop with fully expressive languages. Triple Alpha’s Turing-complete languages unlock true computational freedom, removing limitations of static circuits. Learn more  ](https://www.horizonquantum.com/product/programming-languages/turing-completeness)
[![""](https://images.prismic.io/horizon-v2/aYJptt0YXLCxVVNc_card-illustration-subroutines.png?auto=format,compress) Subroutines from C Bring classical code into quantum programs as callable subroutines. Triple Alpha automatically constructs reusable partial quantum circuits directly from functions written in C. Learn more  ](https://www.horizonquantum.com/product/core-capabilities/subroutines)
[![""](https://images.prismic.io/horizon-v2/aYJpsN0YXLCxVVNX_card-illustration-code-portability.png?auto=format,compress) Code portability Write hardware-agnostic code and compile it for a specific quantum machine. Triple Alpha automatically optimizes programs for the target processor, delivering performant portable code. Learn more  ](https://www.horizonquantum.com/product/core-capabilities/code-portability)
